plugins.name: cortex
plugins.description: Cortex — SDLC Automation Engine. 37 commands, 11 agents, 9 skills, 6 hooks. Forge production-ready software.
plugins.longDescription: Cortex automates the entire software development lifecycle. Generate a PRD from an idea, scaffold projects, build autonomously with self-healing, run multi-agent code reviews, generate tests, deploy with safety checks, and maintain with dependency updates. Supports 3 backend languages: Python/FastAPI, Node.js/NestJS, Java/Spring Boot. Enforces production-grade engineering standards: JWT HTTP-Only Cookies, MySQL+ORM, MongoDB, Redis, React Native, Next.js, GenAI (LiteLLM/Vercel AI/Spring AI + RAG), MCP/A2A protocols. Includes SVG brand identity generation.
features: Fully autonomous product building (PRD to deployed product)
Multi-agent parallel execution with Agent Teams
OWASP Top 10 security scanning with auto-fix
GenAI stack: LiteLLM + Google ADK + Qdrant RAG
MCP Protocol and A2A Protocol support
Infrastructure as Code generation (Docker, K8s, Terraform)
